input: user-item interaction graph and knowledge graph
output: ranked list of items per user
backbone: graph neural network (GNN) with multi-level interactive contrastive learning
loss: supervised BPR loss + intra-graph and inter-graph contrastive losses
key_idea: multi-level interactive contrastive learning that contrasts layers of CF and KG parts within and between local/non-local graphs
datasets: three benchmark datasets (not specified in abstract)
